title: Workflow
description: A WorkflowDefinition (capability/synced): a saved Ask (prompt) or a Workbench graph (graph_json, reserved until the graph bridge — HSM 22). Canonical hub emission: WorkflowRecord.to_dict() (always emits prompt + graph_json, possibly empty); the iPad omits nil fields, so neither is required. KNOWN TYPE DRIFT (locked, HSM-22 territory): web primitives.ts types graphJson as string while the hub emits an object.
